name: Armor Skin
description: Your skin becomes like armor, granting you a natural armor bonus.
benefits: You gain a +1 natural armor bonus to AC, or your existing natural armor bonus increases by +1. This feat can be taken multiple times.

name: Epic Weapon Focus
description: Choose one type of weapon. You are especially good at using that weapon in combat.
benefits: +2 bonus on all attack rolls you make using the selected weapon.

name: Epic Weapon Specialization
description: Choose one type of weapon for which you have already selected Weapon Specialization. You deal extra damage when using this weapon.
benefits: +4 bonus on all damage rolls you make using the selected weapon.

name: Epic Toughness
description: You are significantly tougher than normal.
benefits: You gain +30 hit points. This feat can be taken multiple times.

name: Great Smiting
description: You can make exceptionally powerful smite attacks.
benefits: When you make a smite attack, you deal +3 damage per point of Charisma bonus (instead of +1).

name: Epic Prowess
description: You are more skilled in combat than you once were.
benefits: +1 bonus on all attack rolls.

name: Epic Spell Penetration
description: Your spells break through spell resistance much more easily than normal.
benefits: +2 bonus on caster level checks to overcome a creature's spell resistance.

name: Improved Combat Casting
description: You are adept at casting spells in combat.
benefits: +4 bonus on Concentration checks to cast defensively.

name: Improved Spell Capacity (10th)
description: You can use 10th-level spell slots.
benefits: You gain one spell slot per day of any spell level up to 10th. You do not learn a spell of that level automatically. You must still have an ability score high enough to cast spells of that level.

name: Legendary Climber
description: You can climb rapidly.
benefits: You can ignore any penalties for accelerated climbing or rapid climbing.

name: Legendary Rider
description: You can ride creatures not normally suitable as mounts.
benefits: You can ride any creature, even creatures not trained for riding. You do not take penalties for riding a creature without a saddle.

name: Epic Reputation
description: You are famous throughout the land.
benefits: Your reputation provides a +4 bonus on Diplomacy and Intimidate checks.

name: Overwhelming Critical
description: Your critical hits are incredibly deadly.
benefits: When you score a critical hit, the target must make a Fortitude save (DC 10 + 1/2 your character level + your Strength modifier) or be killed instantly.

name: Perfect Two-Weapon Fighting
description: You are the ultimate two-weapon fighter.
benefits: You can make as many attacks with your off-hand weapon as with your primary weapon, using the same base attack bonus.

name: Planar Turning
description: You can turn or rebuke outsiders.
benefits: You can use your turn/rebuke undead ability to turn/rebuke outsiders as if they were undead.

name: Superior Initiative
description: You react even faster than normal in combat.
benefits: +4 bonus on initiative checks (stacks with Improved Initiative).

name: Epic Fortitude
description: You have tremendously high fortitude.
benefits: +4 bonus on Fortitude saving throws.

name: Epic Reflexes
description: You have tremendously fast reflexes.
benefits: +4 bonus on Reflex saving throws.

name: Epic Will
description: You have tremendous willpower.
benefits: +4 bonus on Will saving throws.

name: Damage Reduction
description: You can shrug off some damage from attacks.
benefits: You gain damage reduction 3/–. This feat can be taken multiple times, increasing DR by 3 each time.
